overview.short: St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital) is a much-loved spiritual town in Uttarakhand, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: The Church of St. John in the Wilderness is an Anglican church built in the 1840s in Uttarakhand, India, and one of Nainital's oldest buildings.

topPlaces.name: Tendukheda, Damoh
topPlaces.description: Tendukheda is a town and municipality (nagar parishad) in Damoh district in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is also a tehsil, or administrative division, which is part of Damoh Lok Sabha constituency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital)?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital) is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital)?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pantnagar Airport (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Kathgodam (Nainital railhead) (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital)?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital) at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital)?
faq.a: Stays in St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital) start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. John in the Wilderness (Nainital)?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tendukheda, Damoh.
